subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou Who art kind, generous, and merciful! We are servants at Thy threshold, all abiding beneath the shadow of Thy oneness
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند مهربانا کریما رحیما ما بندگان آستان توایم و جمیع در ظل
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @unity in diversity, @prayer for spiritual recognition
